title: 18'' inch Collapsible Traffic Safety Cones, 4 pcs Multi Purpose Pop-up Cones with Reflective Collar for Road Parking, Driving Practice
features: 🔴MULTI FUNCTIONS - The safety cones can be used in personal or public areas, like garden,parking lots, road, square. Create caution or work areas in your driveway or marks off safe places for kids play in the driveway or playground.

🔴PREMIUM PVC MATERIAL - The traffic barricade are made of environmentally friendly PVC material. The safety cones are flexible, weighted and durable, also can be continuously overlapped and will not take up too much space.

🔴2 REFLECTIVE COLLARS - With 2 reflective strips (1.4”）, the cones are highly visible during day or night. The 360 degrees visibility is sign alternative even in fog, rain, snow or other bad conditions.
🔴DURABLE AND STABLE - Each traffic cone is heavy-duty, it's a great barrier which can stand high temperature, sun burning, cold icing or heavy crash.
🔴EASY TO STORE：The base size of tall cones is 9.65“x9.65”, each cone can be continuously overlapped which only take small space in your car or garage. Can carry the big cones conveniently.
description: Product Description Looking for weighted and unbreakable traffic cones? Here they are! We have 2 different sizes 18 inches, 28 inches, can meet different purposes Our safety cones have reflective collars that are highly visible during the day Night. They can be used in personal, public areas or commercial purposes, such as Garden, Parking, Street, Space. Create warning areas in your driveway or mark safe places for children who can play in the driveway or on the playground. Why Choosing GUARDLEAD SAFETY Collapsible Traffic Cones? Our Cones are made to address the weaknesses found in other cones, they are made of the materials to meet all your needs & to exceed your expectations. DURABLE MATERIAL- The traffic cones are made of PVC material, they are flexible, weighted and durable. HIGH VISIBLE REFLECTIVE STRIPS- 360 degrees reflective strips, can easily be seen even in fog, rain, snow or other bad conditions. OVERLAPPING STORAGE- Those safety cones can be continuously overlapped and will not take up too much space. STABLE HOLD BASE- Heavy duty hold base can stand high temperature, sun burning, cold icing, heavy crash. Large square base The wide PP base makes the road cone station more stable. In the event of high winds, sand and gravel can be added through the base hole to increase stability. It is also convenient to pour out the sand after use. Cones For Parking Lot Collapsible safety cones come with 4 flashing red lights, it is very eye-catching no matter whether it is day or night. It can always alert people. Waterproof Constructed of orange waterproof solid oxford fabric,which is odorless, healthy, safe, impact-resistant, That determined that our traffic cones are more flexible yet highly durable. Stand more straight The wide PP base makes the road cone station more stable. In the event of high winds, sand and gravel can be added through the base hole to increase stability. It is also convenient to pour out the sand after use. MULTI FUNCTIONS The safety cones can be used in personal or public areas, like garden,parking lots, road, square. Create caution or work areas in your driveway or marks off safe places for kids play in the driveway or playground. High visible at night Cone for parking lot & parking practice Set Up Roadblocks & Control traffic when vehicles broken down Multipurpose, the cones can be used for soccer agility training, camping signs,dog agility training and so on. 4 Pack 18 inch Collapsible Cones Single Pack 18 inch Collapsible Cones 4 Pack 28 inch Collapsible Cones Single Pack 28 inch Collapsible Cones Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 289 4.6 out of 5 stars 289 4.6 out of 5 stars 289 4.6 out of 5 stars 289 Price £33.96 £ 33 . 96 £12.63 £ 12 . 63 £54.97 £ 54 . 97 £16.72 £ 16 . 72 Meets MUTCD Standards ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Height 18 inch 18 inch 28 inch 28 inch Weight 4.1 lb 0.9 lb 6.8 lb 1.9 lb Base Width 9.65 inch 9.65 inch 12.2 inch 12.2 inch Reflective Collar ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Light Included no data no data ✓ ✓ Carry Bag Included ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Application 1. low-speed roadways, 2. daytime driving, 3. parking lot, 4. bicycle, roller skating, driving and other training, 5. soccer training, 6. warning signs, 7. construction sites 1. low-speed roadways, 2. daytime driving, 3. parking lot, 4. bicycle, roller skating, driving and other training, 5. soccer training, 6. warning signs, 7. construction sites 1. freeway & highway, 2. night driving, 3. parking lot, 4. bicycle, roller skating, driving and other training, 5. soccer training, 6. warning signs, 7. construction sites, 8.
